curveRmetrics 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
    • Computing Standard Curve Quality Control Metrics using curveRmetrics

Compute the inflection point for a single curve row (worker)

Source: R/parameter_normalization_functions.R
compute_inflection_point_worker.Rd

Normalises parameters via .normalise_params, locates the inflection concentration with .inflection_x, and evaluates the corresponding response with .evaluate_curve.

Usage

compute_inflection_point_worker(row, verbose = TRUE)

Arguments

row

A single-row data frame with curve parameters and a method column.

verbose

Logical; if TRUE (default) emits diagnostic messages with the resolved parameters and computed inflection coordinates.

Value

A named list with elements:

inflect_x

Natural-scale concentration at the inflection point.

inflect_y

Predicted response at the inflection point.

family

Canonical family name.

source

Fitting method ("frequentist" or "bayesian").

params

The normalised parameter list passed to the worker functions.
